case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. WILLIAM ESTRADA

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY WILLIAM ESTRADA SET FOR JAN-28-2011 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-29-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. CONTINUED PER ORDER OF AUGUST 13, 2010. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT RWEPORTED. (506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY WILLIAM ESTRADA SET FOR AUG-13-2010 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-28-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN 506, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. SETTLEMENT PENDING.
